north_star: Accelerate time-to-value for all factories by enforcing early demand-validation gates, utilizing local-first LLM compute to minimize operational costs, and deploying reusable monetization/relay templates to scale new product rollouts.
completion_definition: PERT dashboard shows current project truth
Agents have assigned owners and RACI
Tests prove backend, relay, doctrine, mission execution, UI, and sustainment
Michael no longer has to manually copy/paste routine commands
Early demand-validation (G1) completed prior to full feature buildout
Local-first LLM routing utilized for low-risk tasks to minimize API spend
